mapper.select: INSERT INTO learning_plan_draft ( user_id, status, command_json, messages_json, missing_fields_json, assistant_message, draft_plan_json, confirmed_plan_id, expires_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{status}, #{commandJson, typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{messagesJson, typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{missingFieldsJson, typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{assistantMessage}, #{draftPlanJson, typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{confirmedPlanId}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_plan_draft SET status = #{status}, command_json = #{commandJson, typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, messages_json = #{messagesJson, typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, missing_fields_json = #{missingFieldsJson, typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, assistant_message = #{assistantMessage}, draft_plan_json = #{draftPlanJson, typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, confirmed_plan_id = #{confirmedPlanId}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, status, command_json, messages_json, missing_fields_json, assistant_message, draft_plan_json, confirmed_plan_id, expires_at, created_at, updated_at FROM learning_plan_draft WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}

INSERT INTO learning_plan ( user_id, status, title, plan_json, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{status}, #{title}, #{planJson, typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) RETURNING id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_plan_phase ( plan_id, phase_index, title, duration_weeks, focus ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{phaseIndex}, #{title}, #{durationWeeks}, #{focus} )

INSERT INTO learning_plan_recommended_problem ( phase_id, slug, frontend_id, title, title_cn, difficulty, reason, sort_order ) SELECT phase.id, #{slug}, #{frontendId}, #{title}, #{titleCn}, #{difficulty}, #{reason}, #{sortOrder} FROM learning_plan_phase phase WHERE phase.plan_id = #{planId} AND phase.phase_index = #{phaseIndex}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, status, title, plan_json, created_at, updated_at FROM learning_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, user_id, status, title, plan_json, created_at, updated_at FROM learning_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, user_id, status, title, plan_json, created_at, updated_at FROM learning_plan WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
